arts.ttl: Intense battle in store as Man United rival City for potential €60million transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City are reportedly both keen on a potential transfer move for Atalanta midfielder Ederson this summer. The Brazil international has shone during his time in Serie A and it makes sense that he now seems to be attracting interest from bigger clubs. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops MAJOR Man Utd transfer hint
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has admitted that qualifying for the Champions League could “change everything” for his transfer plans this summer. Amorim has previously admitted that his side will be required to sell before they can buy this summer, and he has now revealed that Man Utd’s Europa League fortunes could have a major impact on their transfer business ahead of the 2025-26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Champions League hero Declan Rice fancied Manchester United transfer
arts.sum: Rice has earned plaudits from across Europe since joining Arsenal but the midfielder could have joined United two years earlier

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk's net worth, wife, new Liverpool contract, house rented from Man Utd icon
arts.sum: After months of uncertainty, Virgil van Dijk has finally put pen to paper on a new two-year contract with Liverpool. Here we take a closer look at the Reds captain's life

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney fires two-word Manchester United message amid managerial return links
arts.sum: Man Utd great Wayne Rooney has been linked with a return to management after confessing his aspirations to manage the club in the future.

arts.ttl: Man United willing to accept cut-price offer for player who is destined for exit now
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly open to selling striker Rasmus Hojlund this summer, potentially accepting offers of around £50 million. This decision comes amid growing interest from Italian clubs, notably Juventus, who are exploring the possibility of bringing the Danish forward back to Serie A. arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko: Man United, Arsenal, Chelsea among clubs who 'learn asking price' of Leipzig star amid 'gentleman's agreement'
arts.sum: A host of Europe's top clubs reportedly discover the asking price of in-demand RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana mistakes proved Manchester United 'arrogance' ahead of make-or-break Lyon clash
arts.sum: The editor-in-chief of Get French Football News spoke to the MEN ahead of Man Utd's huge clash against Lyon.

arts.ttl: How football tycoon gave Lyon a new lease of life
arts.sum: Lyon need a "new lease of life" to remain "one of the best" in Europe and trailblazing businesswoman Michele Kang is providing that spark.

arts.ttl: Revealed: How close Man United really came to signing 'genius' French wonderkid Rayan Cherki when he was 15 - and the signs that suggest he will leave Lyon this summer with United and Liverpool in pursuit
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT: Cherki arrives at Old Trafford with nine goals and 18 assists in 36 games this season across all competitions at club level. Nobody has more assists in the Europa League.
